entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Povvojnek ki upotpunjuje misao.

entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Knjižnica tečaja je najjača ko se traženje poklapa z poznatom vještinom, temom ali standardom.

entries.source: A crawlable directory of every guest learning chat entrypoint.
entries.value: Direktorij svakog gosta ki uči čavrlja.

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: kritičara;

entries.source: A direct explanation can be useful. But sometimes the best way to understand an idea is to wrestle with it.
entries.value: Izravna objašnjenja mogu biti korisna, ali ponekad je najbolji način da shvatiš ideju je da se boriš z njom.

entries.source: A focused collection of inspir guides about {value1}, with prompts, study workflows, and related public learning modes.
entries.value: Fokusirana zbirka inspir vodnika o {value1}, z poticajima, studijskim radnim tokom in srodnim načinima učenja.

entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Besplatan UI učenje pratilac za ljude ki se uče.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Besplatan UI tutor za učence ki žele razumeti, a ne kopirati.

entries.source: A free public AI learning companion for tutoring, practice, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.

entries.source: A free-to-access AI tutor layer that can fit your institution.
entries.value: Besplatan dostup UI tutor sloj ki lahko stati na vašu instituciju.

entries.source: A generic answer can make a worksheet look finished while leaving the misconception untouched. The math route links hints, step checks, Socratic questions, quizzes, and flashcards into one learning loop.
entries.value: Generički odgovor lahko napraviti radni list izgleda završen dok ostavljajuči ponapako netaknut. Matematička ruta ptezuje sugestije, korake provjere, Sokratska vprašanja, kvizi, in flash kartice v jednu petlju učenja.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Dobra obitelj UI radni protok trebao bi učiniti učenca neovisnijim, ne ovisnijim. Roditelji mogu uporabljati javne stranice kako bi vidjeli kar je svaki način pomenilo učiniti preden početka djeteta.

entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Dobra seja učenja ima petlju

entries.source: A good path does not end at the answer. It ends with a test, a correction, and a next repetition.
entries.value: Dobar put se ne završava odgovorom. Završava se testom, korekcijom in sljedečim ponavljanjem.

entries.source: A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Voden prostor za sklepanje z discipliniranim spraševanjem

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Nagovještaj ki pomaže bez davanja svega.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: A Khan Academy alternativa za uživo UI učenje momenta.

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Učenik lahko otvoriti Učiti bilo kar, Sokratska instrukcije, Domači dio Trener, Matematički korak trener, kvizi, ali flash kartice izravno v načinu gostovanja iz imenika javnog učenja.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Učenik odabira izmedžu alata obično treba jednu od tri stvari: strukturirani nastavni načrt, live tutor za zaglavljenu točku, ali praksa petlja ki čini da ideja ostane naučena.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Učenik se često kreče kroz pripremljene snimke, članke, vaje in pločice.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Učenik počinje unutar načinno specifičnog čavrljanja in lahko pitati za jednostavniji načinel, teže vprašanje, kviz, kartica za ponavljanje špil, ali kritiku.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Učenik, roditelj, nastavnik in samoučitelj često traže isti UI tutor na različitim jezicima. Odvojene stranice čine prave primereve in sigurnosne granice jasnejšim.

entries.source: A temporary loading state for inspir.
entries.value: Stanje privremenog učitavanja za inspir.

entries.source: A tutor for the first question
entries.value: Tutor za prvo vprašanje

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Korisna kartica postavlja jednu stvar. Ne bi trebala skrivati pet vprašanja unutar jednog prompt. Trebala bi biti dovoljno specifična da odgovori, ali ne toliko uska da postaje besmislena.

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Koristan povijesni UI odgovor treba imati dva sloja.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Slaba UI kartica za ponavljanje kaže:

entries.source: A weak prompt only names a topic. A strong prompt names the topic, the level, the sticking point, and the kind of help you want. Use this {value1} as the context, then ask the mode to make you do something with it.
entries.value: Slaba prompt samo naziva temu. Jaka prompt naziva temu, razinu, bodljikavu točku, in vrstu pomoči koju želite. Koristite ta {value1} kao kontekst, a zatim zatražite način da učinite nekar z njom.

entries.source: A working next move, a clearer bug or concept, and a project path that teaches through doing.
entries.value: Rad sljedeči potez, jasnija buba ali koncept, in projektna staza ki uči kroz rad.

entries.source: According to CalOPPA we agree to the following:Users can visit our site anonymously; our Privacy Policy link includes the word “Privacy”, and can easily be found on the home page of our website; Users will be notified of any privacy policy changes on our Privacy Policy Page; Users are able to change their personal information by emailing us at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Prema CalOPPA pristajemo na sljedeče:Korisnici mogu anonimno posjetiti našu stran; naš link o zasebnosti uključuje riječ “Privacy” in lako se lahko nači na početnoj stranici naše web-stranice; Korisnici če biti obaviješteni o bilo kakvim spremembama v politici zasebnosti na našoj stranici; Korisnici su v mogučnosti promijeniti svoje osobne podatke putem e-pošte na support@inspir.app

entries.value: Dodaj kontekst in ograničenja

entries.value: Dodaj savjete bez davanja odgovora

entries.source: Add nodes, test relationships, find gaps, and revise the map.

entries.source: Additionally, you agree not to:
entries.value: Osim toga, se strinjate da ne:

entries.source: After each hint, explain why the step works before continuing.
entries.value: Po vsakem namigu razloži, zakaj korak deluje, preden nadaljuješ.

entries.source: After every learner answer, identify the claim, reasoning, assumptions, gaps, contradictions, or corrected insight. Give one brief read of their answer, update the reasoning map with concise labels, then ask exactly one next-best question.
entries.value: Nakon svakog odgovora učenca, identificirati tvrdnju, obrazloženje, pretpostavke, praznine, proturječja, ali korigirani uvid. Dati jedno kratko čitanje svog odgovora, posodobiti mapu razmišljanja z konciznim oznakama, a zatim postaviti natančno jedno sljedeče najbolje vprašanje.

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: UI lahko pomoči da se flash kartice brže, ali učenje još uvijek dolazi iz dobivanja. Ako alat piše kartice in učenec niko ne bori za odgovor na njih, gotovo ništa se nije promijenilo. Korisna verzija pretvara neuredne bilješke v fokusirane poticaje, onda čini učenec prisječa preden otkrivanja odgovora.

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: UI vam lahko pomoči da brže učite. Takodžer vam lahko pomoči da v potpunosti izbjegnete učenje.

entries.source: AI can make one-to-one learning dramatically more available.
entries.value: UI lahko napraviti jedno-na-jedan učenje dramatično dostupnijim.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: UI lahko pretvoriti grube bilješke v čistijih poticaja za dobivanje. To lahko podijeliti široke ideje na manje kartice, dodati primere, in identificirati zamke učenca lahko propustiti.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: UI Debate Trener za oštre argumente je fokusiran način za uporaba UI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Način je izgradžen oko odredženog posla: Odaberite bilo koju temu in iči glavu na glavu v pravoj raspravi. Odaberite stranu, dobiti izazov, in naučiti napraviti bolje argumente.
